U

unsubscribe(Viewer, Referendum) - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.services.NotificationObserver
Unsubscribes a viewer from receiving notifications for a specific referendum
update(ReferendumResult) - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.services.NotificationObserver
Updates the subscribers with the result of a referendum evaluation Notifies each subscribed viewer with a notification containing the referendum result
updateObserver(ReferendumResult) - Method in class com.oop.referendumserver.services.EvaluateAspect
After returning advice that triggers the update of observers with the result of the referendum evaluation
UserException - Exception Class in com.oop.referendumserver.services.exceptions
Exception class representing an error related to user operations.
UserException(String) - Constructor for exception class com.oop.referendumserver.services.exceptions.UserException
Constructs a new UserException with the specified detail message
usernameTextField - Variable in class com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers.SignInController
 
usernameValidationLabel - Variable in class com.oop.referendumserver.view.controllers.SignInController
 
UserRepository - Interface in com.oop.referendumserver.db.repository
Repository interface for managing users in the database Extends ListCrudRepository to provide additional list-related CRUD operations
UserService - Class in com.oop.referendumserver.services
Service class for managing user-related operations.
UserService(UserRepository) - Constructor for class com.oop.referendumserver.services.UserService
Constructs a new UserService with the specified UserRepository
